aiSummary: Exceptional professionalism and friendliness of the team; high-quality photos and videos that capture each client's essence.

items.name: Michelle Yales
items.text: The team is great to work with! They are knowledgeable and passionate about what they do! It shows in their end product.

items.name: Robin Geffen
items.text: This is a fantastic company. The photographer Scott is top notch, and the video is always great.

items.name: Rina Clerc
items.text: I couldn't be happier with the outstanding photography and videography services provided.

items.name: Susan Bemis
items.text: First time doing a photo shoot. The staff made it so easy and low pressure.. will definitely do it again.
